basic_details.job_title: NBRC Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the NBRC Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Science or Engineering, or an M.D./M.S. degree in any area of medicine, with research interests in Biotechnology and Life Sciences, and a good academic record with at least one first-author publication arising from PhD work.
qualification.details: Research Associate-I: Ph.D. in Science or Engineering, or an M.D./M.S. degree in any area of medicine, with research interests in Biotechnology and Life Sciences, and a good academic record with at least one first-author publication arising from PhD work. Applicants who have already submitted their Ph.D./ M.D./ M.S. thesis are also eligible.

salary_details.details: Research Associate (Ph.D. Thesis Submitted candidate): ₹ 45,000/- + HRA as per applicable. Research Associate (Ph.D. candidate): ₹ 58,000/- + HRA as per applicable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBRC Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBRC Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NBRC Research Associate-I position is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. in Science or Engineering, or an M.D./M.S. degree in medicine, with relevant research interests and at least one first-author publication from their PhD work.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate-I post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 58,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on whether the candidate has submitted their thesis or qualified for the degree.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate-I position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted for the interview based on their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have submitted their PhD thesis apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have already submitted their Ph.D., M.D., or M.S. thesis are eligible to apply. They will be offered a lower fellowship amount until they qualify for the degree.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Brain Research Centre (NBRC).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NBRC. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
